response.step_by_step_log: Identified VTuber Kazama Iroha speaking at the start of the video. At 01:30, text appeared showing "W/X/Y" and "作詞・作曲: Tani Yuuki", indicating the song and artist. Performed a search for "W/X/Y Tani Yuuki Japanese and English lyrics" and successfully retrieved the lyrics for both languages.
response.global_summary: The video segment features a live performance by VTuber Kazama Iroha. It begins with a dialogue/talking interval followed by a performance of the song 'W/X/Y' by Tani Yuuki.

scenes.description: Kazama Iroha speaking to the audience on stage.
Kazama Iroha performs the song 'W/X/Y', with the song title and artist information appearing on screen at the start.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
垂れ流したテレビの音
溜めてしまった洗濯物は今日こそ
晴れでもあえて
外には出ないでいよう
映えないスナックとアルコールで
乾杯をしよう
二人、酸いも甘いも
噛み合わないとしても
お互い寄り添うように
少しずらしてみようよ
君がくれた太陽
月で隠れないよう
輝き満ちるように歌うメロディ
戯れる Slowly flowing
愛してるも通り越して
似た者同士
こうして
年老いるまで笑っていたいね
君がいなきゃ lonely lonely day
夢の中 Fall asleep in bed
起こすから morning callで
I'll protect you from nightmares, Baby
scenes.reference_lyrics_en: The sound of the TV left on, the laundry I'd accumulated, today of all days, even if it's sunny, let's not go out. A toast with unphotogenic snacks and alcohol, the two of us, sweet and bitter, though we don't always click, let's lean on each other and drift a little. The sun you gave me, don't let it hide in the moon, the melody of our shining song. Play, slowly flowing, even the love, passing through, kindred spirits, let's keep laughing until we grow old. If you aren't here, it's a lonely, lonely day, in my dreams, I fall asleep in bed, and I'll wake you with a morning call, I'll protect you from nightmares, Baby.
